overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a misty forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path, passing an abandoned cart, encountering two NPC travelers, and discovering a dead body in the increasingly dark woods.

sparse trees scattered across the background landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through an open marshy grassland at night. The area is surrounded by tall green grass with scattered trees visible in the misty background, creating an atmospheric but exposed wilderness setting.

events.description: forest becomes denser with trees closing in on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the forest thickens and an abandoned cart comes into view ahead

dense cluster of pine trees forming a dark wall on the right
abandoned wooden cart with broken wheels sitting on the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The open grassland gives way to denser forest as trees close in on both sides. An abandoned wooden cart becomes visible in the distance on the path, and the atmosphere grows more enclosed and ominous.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with abandoned cart and travelers

events.description: passing the abandoned wooden cart on the right side of the path
encountering two NPC travelers walking in the opposite direction on the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the abandoned cart and encounters two travelers walking toward him on the narrow forest path. The trees press in closely on both sides, and white wildflowers line the right side of the trail.

events.description: discovering a dead body lying on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing past a dead body lying on the ground and proceeding deeper into the misty woods

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down on the ground next to the path

entered.detail: thick mist and fog obscuring the deeper forest ahead

segments.scene_description: After passing the travelers, Geralt discovers a dead body on the side of the path. The forest grows darker and thicker with mist rolling in from the deeper woods ahead, creating a foreboding atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty wilderness that transforms from an open marshy grassland into a claustrophobic, foreboding forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through tall green grass under a night sky, with scattered trees appearing faintly in the distance. As the path progresses, the open landscape gives way to a denser forest where the trees close in on both sides, eventually revealing an abandoned wooden cart ahead. The scene then shifts as Geralt passes the cart and encounters two travelers on the narrow trail lined with white wildflowers. Finally, the camera follows him past the travelers to a dead body on the roadside, while the woods grow darker and thick mist rolls in from the depths of the forest.
